name: paylocity-mcp
description: MCP server for the Paylocity REST API — read employees, positions, pay rates, deductions, taxes, cost centers, and pay statements through AI assistants.
long_description: Provides AI assistants with structured read access to your Paylocity HCM data. Browse the active roster, inspect pay rates and future pay rates, audit deductions and local taxes, review direct-deposit setups, pull cost-center and pay-grade catalogs, and summarize pay statements. Supports both the modern CoreHR / API Hub endpoints (cursor pagination) and legacy /api/v1, /api/v2 endpoints (raw array). OAuth2 client_credentials with form-urlencoded body, proactive 1-hour token caching, exponential backoff on 429.

paylocity_client_id.title: Paylocity Client ID
paylocity_client_id.description: OAuth2 client ID from Paylocity developer portal. Used with client_secret to mint bearer tokens against /IdentityServer/connect/token (form-urlencoded body).

paylocity_client_secret.title: Paylocity Client Secret
paylocity_client_secret.description: OAuth2 client secret paired with the client ID. Tokens are minted on demand and cached for ~1 hour (Paylocity TTL).

paylocity_company_id.title: Default Paylocity Company ID
paylocity_company_id.description: Default companyId used to scope tool calls. Every Paylocity API path embeds companyId; setting it here means tools don't need it per call. A single client credential may be authorized for multiple company IDs — tools can override per-call.

paylocity_base_url.title: Paylocity API base URL (optional)
paylocity_base_url.description: Optional. Defaults to https://api.paylocity.com. Only override for non-default shards.

paylocity_sandbox.title: Use sandbox host (optional)
paylocity_sandbox.description: Set to "true" to use https://apisandbox.paylocity.com instead of production. Ignored if paylocity_base_url is set.
